sourcePrompt: A tokay gecko clinging spread-eagled to a surface, about twenty-five centimeters long. A chunky gecko with broad toe-padded feet splayed wide, a thick body and tapered tail, a wide blunt head with big lidless gold-ringed eyes, the skin pebbled with fine bumps. Blue-gray ground color dotted boldly with bright orange spots, vivid and alert. Low-poly, game-ready, clean hard edges.
